examples: pixverse videos text "A neon city skyline at dusk"
pixverse videos text "A neon city skyline at dusk" --model v4.5 --duration 8
pixverse videos text "A neon city skyline at dusk" --properties "id,operation"
text.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse videos text` to submit a text-to-video generation job. PROMPT is required and identifies prompt for the video generation. --model PixVerse model identifier. --duration Requested duration in seconds.

status.help: Get the current job status for a PixVerse video generation.
status.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse videos status` to get the current job status for a PixVerse video generation. ITEM_ID is required and identifies the pixverse video_id. --table/-t Display summary as table. --properties/-p Comma-separated fields to include (supports dot-notation).

videos.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse videos` for generate and inspect pixverse videos. Main actions: `videos text`, `videos status`.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

login.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth login` to configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent. --profile/-p Profile name to save credentials to. --force/-F Clear existing credentials and re-authenticate.

logout.help: Clear stored credentials and browser sessions.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

logout.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth logout` to clear stored credentials and browser sessions. --profile/-p Profile name to clear credentials from.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

status.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth status` to check authentication status across profiles. --profile/-p Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles). --table/-t Display as table.

refresh.help: Refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token.
refresh.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth refresh` to refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token. --profile/-p Profile name. --table/-t Display as table.

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth test` to test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles. --table/-t Display as table. --verbose/-v Show detailed checks.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

list.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth profiles list` to list all profiles and show which is the default. --table/-t Display as table. --limit/-l Maximum number of profiles to return.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

get.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth profiles get` to get details for a specific profile. NAME is required and identifies profile name to get details for. --table/-t Display as table.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth profiles create` to create a new profile from .env.example template. NAME is required and identifies profile name (e.g., staging, production).

set-default.help: Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1).

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to set as default

set-default.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth profiles set-default` to set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1). NAME is required and identifies profile name to set as default.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth profiles delete` to delete a profile and its data. NAME is required and identifies profile name to delete. --force/-F Skip confirmation.

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth profiles` for manage authentication profiles. Main actions: `auth profiles list`, `auth profiles get`, `auth profiles create`, `auth profiles set-default`, `auth profiles delete`.

auth.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse auth` for manage pixverse authentication. Main actions: `auth login`, `auth logout`, `auth status`, `auth refresh`, `auth test`, `auth profiles`.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.
clear.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse cache clear` to remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.

cache.usage_instructions: Use `pixverse cache` for manage response cache. Main actions: `cache clear`.

usage_instructions: Use `pixverse` for cLI interface for Pixverse API. Commands follow `pixverse <command-group> <action>`. Primary groups are videos, auth, cache.
